alerts.title: Trump threatens Iran strike 'very hard tonight' as ceasefire fractures
alerts.summary: Trump vowed to strike Iran 'very hard tonight' and threatened US takeover of Iranian oil/gas sectors, contradicting prior de-escalation rhetoric. Concurrent reports from NPR, PBS, Axios confirm kinetic exchanges resumed; oil prices spiked on strike threat (incidents feed, 15+ sources). Represents direct escalation and public commitment to military action.

alerts.title: Iran maintains 60% enrichment; breakout timeline compressed amid escalation
alerts.summary: Iran sustains 60% U-235 enrichment with ~1-2 week breakout window. IAEA board resolution demanding uranium stock reporting signals verification crisis. Kinetic escalation compresses diplomatic window and increases proliferation risk (global_metrics, incidents).

alerts.title: Houthis declare ban on Israeli shipping in Red Sea, resume attacks
alerts.summary: Iran-backed Houthis announced maritime blockade of Israeli vessels in Red Sea and launched new attacks on Israel (Long War Journal, Reuters, multiple outlets). Escalation threatens global shipping and oil market stability in critical chokepoint (incidents, global_metrics).

alerts.title: Iran-linked cyber group claims US military drone hack; threatens World Cup
alerts.summary: Iran-linked cyber group publicly claimed compromise of FBI drone systems and threatened World Cup targeting in retaliation for US airstrikes (France 24, CBS News, Middle East Eye). Represents cyber escalation and willingness to target mass-casualty civilian events (telegram, global_metrics cyber_headlines).

alerts.title: Trump suspends latest Iran strike threat citing 'breakthrough in talks'
alerts.summary: After initial 'very hard tonight' rhetoric, Trump abruptly called off threatened strikes, claiming progress in US-Iran negotiations. Inconsistency with concurrent kinetic exchanges and Iranian denials (PBS, AP News) undermines credibility and signals confusion in US strategy (incidents feed).

analysis_note: US-Iran ceasefire has fractured into active missile/drone exchanges and cyber threats, with nuclear breakout window compressed to 1-2 weeks and Trump's contradictory escalation/de-escalation signals creating strategic ambiguity amid proxy force activation.
